channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
item.description: A doctor is sitting across a desk from a patient. The doctor is holding a tablet and a pen. Medical charts renderings are in the background.

item.title: How I built root cause analysis into my free API uptime monitor
item.description: Most uptime monitors tell you your API is down. Mine tells you why. I got tired of waking up to a vague "monitor failed" alert with zero context. Is it a DNS issue? Did the server crash? Is it a...

item.title: A Developer's Guide to Choosing a GPU for Machine Learning in 2025-2026
item.description: Choosing the right GPU for ML is confusing. Marketing specs don't tell you what matters for training and inference. Here's what actually counts. The Four Specs That Matter 1. VRAM (Most Important)...

item.title: 5 React Prompts That Save Me Hours Every Week
item.description: I've been using AI to write React code for over a year. For the first few months, the output was consistently mediocre — wrong patterns, missing types, no error handling. I kept thinking the AI...

item.title: From Foreground Services to WorkManager: How We Cut Battery Drain by 70%
item.description: 40% of my users on Android 14 were crashing. Every. Single. Day. The crash logs all said the same thing: ForegroundServiceStartNotAllowedException. My auto backup service that had worked fine for...

item.title: Your Agents Are Burning Money on Duplicate API Calls (And You Can't See It)
item.description: Your Agents Are Burning Money on Duplicate API Calls (And You Can't See It) Your agent runs once per hour. It fetches customer data from an API. Each call costs $0.01. That's $240/month. But your...

item.title: Day 6 of My Cloud Journey: Building Secure AWS Networks with VPC, VPC Peering & Billing Alerts
item.description: When I first started learning cloud computing, I mostly focused on launching servers and deploying applications. But as I continued exploring AWS services, I realized something important:...

item.title: Your runbook says one thing. Your infra does another. When did you last compare them?
item.description: There's a conversation that happens in almost every Cloud Operations team, and it almost never happens in a formal meeting. It happens in the hallway, in a direct message, or in the Slack thread...

item.title: I Built a Claude Plugin to Fix AI-Generated Interfaces' User Experience.
item.description: AI Can Ship a UI in Minutes. But It Takes a Trained Eye to See Everything It Gets Wrong. I've spent a decade reviewing interfaces as a UX Designer — conducting heuristic evaluations, running...

item.title: Building a Trust Layer for 10,000 AI Agents — Architecture Deep Dive
item.description: When we started building TaskPod, the question wasn't "can we build an agent registry?" — that's a CRUD app. The real question was: how do you decide which agent to trust with a task when there...

item.title: Real-Time Email: How JMAP Push Eliminates the 15-Minute Delay
item.description: Real-Time Email: How JMAP Push Eliminates the 15-Minute Delay Open your email settings on any traditional email client. Somewhere in there, you will find a setting that says 'Check for new mail...

item.title: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard
item.description: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.

item.title: One of Grammarly’s ‘experts’ is suing the company over its identity-stealing AI feature
item.description: For months, Grammarly has been using the identities of real people (including us) for its "Expert Review" AI suggestions without getting their permission, and now it's facing a lawsuit from one of...

item.title: Ford’s new AI assistant will help fleet owners know if seatbelts are being used
item.description: Ford Pro AI debuted at Work Truck Week in Indianapolis and is now available to all of its U.S.-based Pro telematics subscribers.

item.title: Zendesk acquires agentic customer service startup Forethought
item.description: Forethought was years ahead of its time and the 2018 winner of TechCrunch Battlefield.

item.title: iPhone Fold rumor: iPad-like multitasking, but no iPad apps and no Face ID
item.description: Apple's rumored foldable iPhone will come with an iPad-style interface that will allow users to view apps side-by-side, according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. Gurman also reports that...

item.title: Netflix may have paid $600 million for Ben Affleck’s AI startup
item.description: This deal could rank as among the streaming giant's largest acquisitions ever.

item.title: Some of the best horror games ever made are included in Humble’s latest $15 bundle
item.description: Humble has teamed up with Frictional Games for a new bundle of PC games that pushed the horror genre forward. The bundle includes the Penumbra Collectors Pack, all four Amnesia titles (The Dark...

item.title: Lovable says it added $100M in revenue last month alone, with just 146 employees
item.description: Swedish vibe-coding unicorn Lovable crossed $400 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in February.

item.title: 14,000 routers are infected by malware that's highly resistant to takedowns
item.description: Most of the devices are made by Asus and are located in the US.

item.title: Valve says it will fight New York’s loot box lawsuit
item.description: Valve wants players to know that it plans on fighting New York Attorney General Letitia James' lawsuit, which last month accused the company of promoting "illegal gambling" through its in-game...

item.title: Grammarly Is Facing a Class Action Lawsuit Over Its AI ‘Expert Review’ Feature
item.description: The feature, which Grammarly shut down Wednesday, presented editing suggestions as if they came from established authors and academics—without their consent.

item.title: The Live Nation settlement has industry insiders baffled
item.description: Instead of moving forward with a jury trial against Live Nation-Ticketmaster as expected, the Justice Department announced a settlement Monday that omitted what used to be on the top of its wish...

item.title: Replit snags $9B valuation 6 months after hitting $3B
item.description: Replit raised a new $400 million round and said it hopes to have $1B in ARR by year's end.

item.title: Grammarly says it will stop using AI to clone experts without permission
item.description: Superhuman says it has disabled Grammarly's "expert review" AI feature that said its edit suggestions were "inspired by" real writers, including our editor-in-chief and other Verge staff members....

item.title: Microsoft’s ‘Xbox mode’ is coming to every Windows 11 PC
item.description: Microsoft seems more determined than ever to combine Xbox and Windows - to the point that its next-gen Xbox, codenamed Project Helix, will play PC games too. Today, we learned Helix will go alpha...

item.title: Nvidia Will Spend $26 Billion to Build Open-Weight AI Models, Filings Show
item.description: The move could position the AI infrastructure powerhouse to quickly compete with OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek.

item.title: Microsoft’s next Xbox, Project Helix, won’t reach alpha until 2027
item.description: We're here at the 2026 Game Developers Conference, where Microsoft "VP of Next Generation" Jason Ronald is talking about a topic near and dear to many gamers' hearts: the future of Xbox. Ronald...

item.title: OpenAI’s Sora video generator is reportedly coming to ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's Sora video generator could soon become a built-in feature in ChatGPT, as reported by The Information. Sora is currently only available on its website or as a standalone app, which has...
